Google

EXAMPLE_APP wants to access your Google Account

This will allow EXAMPLE_APP to:

📧 See your primary Google Account email address Allows the app to know which account you're signed in with.
👤 See your personal info, including any personal info you've made publicly available Includes name and profile picture.

By clicking Allow, you allow this app to use your information in accordance with their respective terms of service and privacy policies. You can review or remove access in your Google Account at any time.
